anchors.label: Florida shallow natural lake
anchors.notes: Tropical largemouth benchmark for winter control, early prespawn openings, and long warm-season grass behavior.

anchors.label: Texas reservoir
anchors.notes: South-central reservoir benchmark for windy baitfish windows, winter tightening, and fall shad behavior.

anchors.label: Alabama river current system
anchors.notes: River largemouth benchmark for current seams, dirty-water cover lanes, and bounded warm-season river behavior.

anchors.label: New York natural lake
anchors.notes: Northern clear-lake benchmark for finesse, cooler seasonal posture, and restrained surface behavior.

anchors.label: Georgia highland reservoir
anchors.notes: Clear highland-reservoir overlay for spring baitfish reads and cleaner color behavior.

anchors.label: Louisiana grass lake
anchors.notes: Southern grass overlay for early-fall topwater, frog, swim-jig, and spinnerbait lanes.

anchors.label: Ozarks reservoir
anchors.notes: Shad-transition and inland-reservoir overlay for fall and cold-season crankbait / jerkbait behavior.

anchors.label: Minnesota weed lake
anchors.notes: Northern weedline overlay for midsummer edge behavior and bluebird adjustments.

anchors.label: California Delta freshwater reach
anchors.notes: Western tidal-fresh overlay for grass/current behavior and late-fall stained-water largemouth lanes.

anchors.label: Southern California reservoir
anchors.notes: Warm western reservoir overlay for mild-winter control, early prespawn craw reads, summer topwater, and fall shad behavior.

anchors.label: Pacific Northwest bass lake
anchors.notes: Northwest lake overlay for extended prespawn (spawn is June), summer shallow behavior, and November winter-onset tightening.

anchors.label: Colorado highland reservoir
anchors.notes: Mountain West clear-lake overlay for cold-season winter control, late prespawn (spawn is June), summer topwater, and fall baitfish transition.

anchors.label: Maine clear natural lake
anchors.notes: Northeast clear-lake overlay for the distinct northeast LMB rows: jerkbait-first winter, finesse-spawn, wacky/perch summer, and active-fall-through-November posture.

anchors.label: Gulf Coast dirty grass lake
anchors.notes: Dirty-water gulf_coast overlay: validates GULF_DIRTY_PRESPAWN_GRASS_LAKE (spinnerbait-led March), early-fall dirty window where walking_topwater is penalized and buzzbait/swim_jig/bladed_jig surface, and October FALL_LAKE dirty behavior where spinnerbait dominates.

anchors.label: Midwest dirty backwater lake
anchors.notes: Dirty-water midwest_interior overlay: tests generic dirty clarity impact on PRESPAWN_LAKE (football jig holds via forage), SUMMER_LAKE (walking_topwater displaced by buzzbait/hollow_body_frog), and FALL_LAKE (spinnerbait confirmed).
